description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design, featuring a mix of black and white exterior walls. The house is set on a paved lot with a wooden deck area that includes a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and outdoor seating. Large glass windows and sliding doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor living space. The property is landscaped with palm trees and other decorative trees, enhancing its contemporary aesthetic. A driveway with a parked car is visible, indicating a dedicated parking area adjacent to the house. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong indoor-outdoor connection.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, black and white exterior, large windows, a wooden deck, pool, and landscaped trees.
description_view_0: Oblique view showing the black facade, pool, wooden deck, palm trees, and car parked on the driveway.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the white exterior, minimal windows, and the car on the driveway.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the white walls, upper story, pool, deck, and surrounding trees.
description_view_3: Front view with the main black facade, large windows, pool, deck furniture, and lush landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large glass door, minimal steps, and is integrated into the black facade with no porch or overhang.
